ROOM
Builders
WASD move · Space jump · double-tap Space to fly (Shift = down)
Left-click break · Right-click place / use doors & TNT
1–0 / scroll picks a block · middle-click copies a block

BLOCK PARTY

A shared world of blocks.
Build it live with up to 4 friends.

Everyone who enters the same room code
walks into the same world.

PAUSED

Click to keep building

TURN YOUR PHONE SIDEWAYS

Block Party plays in landscape.
If nothing happens, switch off your phone’s rotation lock.
